## 📝 Description

## 🛠 Type of Change

- [ ] 🟣 **Domain**: Business logic, Aggregates, Entities, Value Objects
- [ ] 🔵 **Application**: Command/Query handlers, Use Cases
- [ ] 🟢 **Infrastructure**: Persistence, API Clients, Controllers, Mappers
- [ ] 🟡 **Frontend**: UI Components, State, Hooks

## 🏗 DDD & Clean Architecture Checklist

- [ ] **Domain Integrity**: Logic is pure and doesn't depend on frameworks or DB.
- [ ] **Encapsulation**: Aggregate Root maintains its invariants.
- [ ] **Event-Driven**: Appropriate Domain Events are emitted.
- [ ] **Persistence**: Data Mappers are used (no DB decorators in Domain).
- [ ] **CQRS**: Commands and Queries are properly separated.

## 🧪 Testing & Quality

- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Linting and formatting passed
- [ ] Security audit passed

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes # (issue number)
